target.verified_fact: make_positive_windows creates event_hour - offset for offset 1..24.
target.feature_target_separation: target and target_datetime_hour excluded by Stage7A feature configuration

overlap.lag_autocorrelation: not_identifiable_from_negative-sampled candidate grid; requires full all-segment hourly grid

split.split_time_axis: datetime_hour interpreted as Asia/Almaty local civil time

sampling.verified_fact: Stage6 sample_negatives retains all positive windows then draws five negatives per positive at the same datetime_hour.
sampling.stratification: positive segment road_highway group with all-segment fallback
sampling.same_negative_population_cross_split: not possible because datetime ranges are disjoint; sampling itself is before global temporal split

calibration.class_weights: none in saved Stage7B effective parameters
calibration.conclusion: outputs are calibrated only against sampled prevalence; they must not be called natural-production probabilities.

unsampled.evidence: training_dataset_24h and Stage7A/7B artifacts are explicitly 1:5 sampled; Stage8C is one current inference hour without historical labels.
unsampled.blocker: No saved full all-segment historical feature/prediction grid exists for natural-prevalence evaluation.

blockers: No saved full all-segment historical feature/prediction grid exists for natural-prevalence evaluation.
outputs are calibrated only against sampled prevalence; they must not be called natural-production probabilities.
